Interface AiffDecoder

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, Closeable
All Known Implementing Classes:
Aiff16BitDecoder, Aiff24BitDecoder, Aiff32BitDecoder, Aiff32BitFloatDecoder, Aiff64BitFloatDecoder, Aiff8BitDecoder, LawDecoder
public interface AiffDecoder extends Closeable
